name: Mixed Vegetables Stir-Fry B1
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Bok choy (or 4 large Celery stalks)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the Bok choy with its leaves diagonally into 1/2-inch slices.
2. Snap off ends and remove strings from pea pods. Place pea pods in boiling water to cover; cook, covered, for 1 minute. Drain immediately and rinse under cold water. Drain again.
3. Cut mushrooms into 1/4-inch slices. Cut green onions into 2-inch pieces.
4. Mix cornstarch with 2 tablespoons cold water to dissolve. Set aside.
5. Heat wok until a drop of water bubbles and skitters when sprinkled in the wok.
6. Add oil and rotate wok to coat sides.
7. Add gingerroot and garlic; stir-fry for 1 minute.
8. Add mushrooms and bamboo shoots; stir for 1 minute.
9. Stir in chicken broth and salt; heat to boiling.
10. Stir in dissolved cornstarch. Cook until thickened, about 10 seconds.
11. Add pea pods, green onions, and oyster sauce. Cook and stir for 30 seconds.
12. Serve immediately.
